response: Decision recorded in `DECISION.md`. Summary: adopt Option C (add a small retry-and-alert wrapper to the existing script), reject Conductor for now — the job has no fan-out, no dependencies, and a 100% success rate over 30 days, so a framework's DAG/lineage/backfill features have nothing to solve here. Revisit if the job count grows to ~a dozen interdependent jobs, retries stop being sufficient to handle failures, or an outside stakeholder needs self-service DAG/lineage visibility.
